calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert D. Links, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Wui Kan Cheng, who was placed under oath and examined.
Jenny Ho was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Lisa Mee Kuen Tang.
Default was entered agasint defendant on May 13, 2009.
Amendment to Complaint correcting the spelling of defendant's name in the Court register from Lisa Mee Kuan Tang to Lisa Mee Kuen Tang was filed today, January 28, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed December 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wui Kan Cheng, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lisa Mee Kuen Tang as follows:

Damages/Principal - $90,000.00.
Interest - $8,900.00.
Costs - $460.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $99,360.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
